brandPrefix: Premium automotive detailing brand photography for Daniells Auto Care. Dark, cinematic, near-black background, glossy wet reflections, dramatic studio lighting with a subtle deep-red accent glow, high-end and professional, photorealistic, no text, no watermark, no logos.

items.prompt: Wide cinematic hero shot of a luxury black SUV with flawless mirror-gloss paint being detailed at night, water beading on the hood, dramatic red rim lighting, ultra-wide 16:9 composition with negative space on the left for headline text.
Full vehicle detail in progress, a pristine sedan half-cleaned showing dramatic before/after gloss, detailer with microfiber, moody lighting.
Close-up of a gloved hand foam-washing a glossy black car panel, thick suds, water droplets, deep reflections.
Spotless luxury car interior, conditioned black leather seats, steam cleaning wand, clean dashboard, soft cabin lighting.
Ceramic coating application on a dark car panel, hydrophobic water beading sheeting off, applicator block, slick high-gloss surface.
Dual-action polisher correcting swirl marks on glossy black paint, bright reflection lines, professional paint correction.
Installer applying clear paint protection film to a car's hood, squeegee, flawless invisible film, premium garage.
Professional applying dark window tint film to a car side window, clean precise install, premium look.
A neat row of clean commercial vans and cars freshly detailed, corporate fleet, professional outdoor setting.
Wide shot of a professionally detailed commercial fleet of vehicles lined up, glossy and uniform, corporate, 16:9.
Bold branded share image: dramatic close-up of a luxury car's glossy detailed surface with red accent light, clean composition with open space for a logo, 1200x630 aspect.
